soundness_flags.label: Conjecture 1
soundness_flags.one_line: The final ordering uses the undefined object 'tangent-cone studentization risk'; define the risk functional, e.g. local-limit variance, expected absolute gap, or worst-direction scale.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Define 'tangent-cone studentization risk' explicitly and restate the DML > LRO > ADML ordering in that metric.
Make the flagship threshold fully operational by separating observable inputs to S_n from theoretical rate exponents r_g, r_alpha, omega, and zeta, or state an explicit plug-in/classification rule.
Add a boundary corollary for S_n rank one: it would clarify how the iff frontier behaves when only one of DA or LA is active.

recommended_next_step: Patch the undefined risk metric in Conjecture 1, then rerun novelty review without changing the kernel.
